title:
Phases 3-5 of GH #84 architectural refactoring. Work through these in order:

PHASE 3 (Internal Delegation + AppView + Temporal Coupling):
- 3a: Give Repository insert_dataset() and write_samples() methods. Move logic from Index.insert_dataset (lines 695-872) and Index.write_samples (lines 874-1069) into Repository and _AtmosphereBackend. Index methods become ~20-line dispatchers. Delete _insert_dataset_to_provider.
- 3b: Extract with_appview_fallback() helper to atmosphere/_appview.py. Narrow except Exception to (httpx.HTTPStatusError, httpx.ConnectError, httpx.TimeoutException). Replace all 8 fallback sites in schema.py, records.py, lens.py, labels.py.
- 3c: Switch _AtmosphereBackend._ensure_loaders() to eager initialization in __init__. Remove all _ensure_loaders() calls from public methods.

PHASE 4 (Provider Fixes — independent, can do in any order):
- 4a: Fix Redis label resolution bug in providers/_redis.py:159-181. Add created_at field to store_label. Sort by created_at in get_label when no version specified. No backfill — old labels without created_at sort last.
- 4b: Fix Redis N+1 query in iter_entries (providers/_redis.py:74-79). Use Redis pipeline for batch retrieval.
- 4c: Add SQLite indexes in providers/_sqlite.py for schema (name, version) and labels (name, created_at DESC).

PHASE 5 (Atmosphere Namespacing + Cleanup):
- 5a: Create RecordOps, BlobOps, XrpcClient classes. Expose as atmo.records, atmo.blobs, atmo.xrpc lazy properties. Common ops (list_datasets, search_datasets, auth) stay on root. Flat power-user methods get FutureWarning deprecation.
- 5b: Switch all 18 DeprecationWarning sites to FutureWarning. Add '# Removal: v1.0' comments.
- 5c: Fix thread-safety of _atproto_client_class lazy init with threading.Lock double-check.
- 5d: Split StubManager into SchemaStubManager/LensStubManager or extract shared StubWriter base.

See .design/084-architectural-refactoring.md for full spec and design decisions.
